markets.question: Spread: Ipswich Town FC (-2.5)
markets.description:
In the upcoming EFL Championship game, scheduled for March 14 at 11:00 AM ET:

This market will resolve to "Ipswich Town FC" if Ipswich Town FC win the game by 3 or more goals.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Sheffield Wednesday FC".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

This market will resolve according to the official final score published on efl.com. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

markets.question: Sheffield Wednesday FC vs. Ipswich Town FC: O/U 1.5
markets.description:
In the upcoming EFL Championship game between Sheffield Wednesday FC and Ipswich Town FC, scheduled for March 14 at 11:00 AM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if Sheffield Wednesday FC and Ipswich Town FC combine to score 2 or more goals in this game.

If the combined total is less than 2, this market will resolve to "Under".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

markets.question: Sheffield Wednesday FC vs. Ipswich Town FC: Both Teams to Score
markets.description:
In the upcoming EFL Championship game between Sheffield Wednesday FC and Ipswich Town FC, scheduled for March 14 at 11:00 AM ET:

This market will resolve to "Yes" if both Sheffield Wednesday FC and Ipswich Town FC each score at least one goal during the game.
